home.hero_subtitle: Thoughtfully designed apps for everyday needs. Available on iOS and Android.
home.apps_section_sub: Tap any app to learn more, read the privacy policy, or get support.

app1.name: KhetBook
app1.tagline: Your farm's digital brain — from field to profit
app1.description: KhetBook is a premium, offline-first farm business management and ledger app specially designed for small, medium, and progressive Indian farmers. Streamline your agricultural bookkeeping, track crop-wise profits, monitor seasonal budgets, check live Mandi rates, and manage family accounts — all in one secure, easy-to-use application. Whether you cultivate wheat, rice, cotton, sugarcane, fruits, or vegetables, KhetBook replaces paper diaries and complex spreadsheets, helping you increase profit margins by up to 20% through smart financial insights.
app1.feature1_desc: Never let a transaction slip through the cracks. Track every credit (Udhar) and debit for suppliers, labour, and crop buyers. Share WhatsApp statements and export PDF/Excel ledger books in one tap.
app1.feature2_desc: See exactly which crop made money and which didn't. Record all farm expenses — seeds, fertilisers, pesticides, labour — against crop sales income. Visual profit & loss charts make every decision easier.
app1.feature3_desc: Your farm's complete history, season by season. Log sowing dates, irrigation schedules, fertiliser applications, and harvest milestones. Smart reminders ensure you never miss a critical farm activity.
app1.feature4_desc: Sell at the right time, every time. Get real-time rates from 1000+ AGMARKNET mandis across India, paired with 7-day GPS-based local weather forecasts to plan your harvest and transport.
app1.step1_desc: Find KhetBook on the App Store or Google Play and tap Install.
app1.step2_desc: Set up your farm name, location, and crops. No internet required — fully offline from day one.
app1.step3_desc: Log expenses, check Mandi prices, and view your P&L dashboard instantly.

app2.name: Master Unit Calc
app2.tagline: One app. Every calculation. Zero ads.
app2.description: Master Unit Calc is your all-in-one calculator toolkit. Whether you're splitting a bill, calculating loan EMIs, converting units, checking your BMI, or doing scientific math — it's all here in one beautifully designed app. No switching between apps, no ads, just fast and accurate results.
app2.feature1_desc: Make smarter money decisions instantly. Calculate loan EMIs, split bills with friends, compute compound interest, and plan SIP investments — all without switching apps or dealing with ads.
app2.feature2_desc: Your pocket health advisor. Instantly calculate BMI, ideal body weight, daily calorie needs, water intake, and more — beautifully displayed and always accurate.
app2.feature3_desc: From kitchen to construction — convert anything. Length, weight, temperature, area, speed, volume, data, pressure, and 50+ more unit types, all with a single tap.
app2.feature4_desc: Full scientific power in your pocket. Trigonometry, logarithms, powers, roots, and complex expressions — handled with precision, no extra app needed.
app2.step1_desc: Find Master Unit Calc on the App Store or Google Play — it's free.
app2.step2_desc: Browse 20+ calculators across finance, health, science, and unit conversion.
app2.step3_desc: Enter your values and get accurate results instantly — no internet needed.

app3.name: Mastero
app3.tagline: Practice daily. Level up. Become a master.
app3.description: Are you serious about mastering a skill? Whether you're learning guitar, training for a sport, studying a language, or improving a professional craft — Mastero is the practice companion designed to help you grow consistently and effectively. Built on the principles of deliberate practice and long-term skill development, Mastero helps you track your effort, stay consistent, and turn daily practice into real progress.
app3.feature1_desc: Every session counts. Use the precision timer to log duration, rate your focus from 1–5, set difficulty levels, and jot notes on breakthroughs. Build a rich training history you can actually learn from.
app3.feature2_desc: Watch yourself improve over time. Visualise total hours invested, weekly activity patterns, skill-by-skill breakdowns, and GitHub-style heatmap calendars. Your progress, made visible.
app3.feature3_desc: Stay hooked on growth. Build daily streaks, earn XP points for every session logged, level up through ranks, and unlock achievement badges at key milestones. Growth has never felt this rewarding.
app3.feature4_desc: A coach that knows your habits. Get smart session recommendations based on your practice patterns. Personalised reminders for each skill help you build an unstoppable daily routine.
app3.step1_desc: Get Mastero from Google Play — available now.
app3.step2_desc: Create skills you want to master — guitar, coding, a language, sport, anything.
app3.step3_desc: Start the timer, log your session, and watch your progress grow day by day.

app4.name: Money Trail
app4.tagline: Know where every rupee goes — and where to send it next.
app4.description: Managing your money shouldn't be complicated. Money Trail helps you track expenses, plan budgets, and achieve financial goals — all in one simple, powerful app. Whether it's daily spending or long-term savings, you get complete clarity and control over your finances. Works offline, no internet required, with biometric security and optional cloud sync.
app4.feature1_desc: Every transaction, perfectly recorded. Log income and expenses in seconds, assign categories, and get an instant picture of your daily spending — no spreadsheets needed.
app4.feature2_desc: Spend smarter, not harder. Set monthly or category-wise budgets and get alerts before you overshoot. Visual budget meters show exactly how much runway you have left.
app4.feature3_desc: Turn dreams into savings goals. Create goals for travel, gadgets, or emergencies. Track your net worth over time with visual cash flow charts that show your financial growth.
app4.feature4_desc: Bank-level security for your pocket. Lock the app with fingerprint or Face ID. All data stored in encrypted local storage — never exposed. Optional Firebase cloud backup for peace of mind.
app4.step1_desc: Get Money Trail on Google Play — available now.
app4.step2_desc: Set up your wallets, bank accounts, and cards to track your full net worth.
app4.step3_desc: Log transactions in seconds and let Money Trail show you where your money goes.

app5.name: My Class Manager
app5.tagline: Run your academy like a pro — attendance, batches & more.
app5.description: My Class Manager is the ultimate all-in-one solution for academy owners, coaches, and administrators to streamline their day-to-day operations. Whether you run a sports academy, tuition centre, or fitness studio, Class Manager makes it effortless to organise your business with smart batch management, attendance tracking, and role-based access.
app5.feature1_desc: Structure your academy your way. Create unlimited batches, assign students to multiple schedules, set class timings, and keep every group organised — no paperwork needed.
app5.feature2_desc: Mark 30 students in under 30 seconds. Fast, visual attendance marking for each session. View history, export reports, and spot attendance trends at a glance.
app5.feature3_desc: Right info for the right person. Admins see everything. Coaches manage their own batches. Students and parents see only their own data — clean, secure, and purpose-built.
app5.feature4_desc: Keep everyone on the same page. Post announcements to specific batches or the whole academy. A centralised dashboard gives admins a real-time bird's-eye view of all operations.
app5.step1_desc: Get the app from the App Store or Google Play.
app5.step2_desc: Create batches, add coaches and students, and configure your roles in minutes.
app5.step3_desc: Mark attendance, post notices, and view your dashboard — all from one place.

app6.name: My Sports Academy
app6.tagline: From training ground to admin sorted — all in one app.
app6.description: My Sports Academy is a complete sports academy management app designed for cricket academies, football clubs, and multi-sport training centres. Streamline your daily operations with tools to manage players, track attendance, monitor fees, and handle enquiries — all from one easy-to-use platform with multi-user roles for Admins, Coaches, and Parents.
app6.feature1_desc: Your entire squad, organised. Add players, assign them to training batches, track registration details, and manage coaching staff — all from one clean dashboard built for sports academies.
app6.feature2_desc: Attendance done before the warm-up ends. Coaches mark present or absent in seconds. Full attendance history per player, with insights to spot who's falling behind on sessions.
app6.feature3_desc: Never chase a payment again. Track fee dues, record payments, send automated reminders, and generate financial reports. Know exactly who's paid and who hasn't — at a glance.
app6.feature4_desc: Never lose a lead. Capture new enquiries, log follow-ups, and convert prospects to enrolled players. Works fully offline with automatic sync when connectivity returns.
app6.step1_desc: Get the app from the App Store or Google Play.
app6.step2_desc: Add your players, coaches, and batches. Configure roles for Admin, Coach, and Parent access.
app6.step3_desc: Mark attendance, track fees, handle enquiries, and generate reports — all in one place.

app7.name: Yoga Rhythm
app7.tagline: Breathe. Flow. Grow. Your yoga journey starts here.
app7.description: Find Your Flow. Master Your Breath. Track Your Progress. Yoga Rhythm is your ultimate wellness companion for both beginners starting their holistic journey and advanced practitioners perfecting their sequences. Whether you want to energise your morning with Suryanamaskar, find deep calm through Pranayama, or build your own custom workout flows, Yoga Rhythm gives you the tools to practice perfectly at your own pace.
app7.feature1_desc: A complete yoga library in your hands. Guided step-by-step Suryanamaskar sequences and 14 powerful breathing techniques — including Box Breathing, Anulom Vilom, Bhramari, and the calming 4-7-8 method.
app7.feature2_desc: Stay in the flow, not the clock. The interactive visual timer counts down each pose and breath cycle. Customise duration per pose, adjust breathing speed, and follow hands-free audio cues seamlessly.
app7.feature3_desc: Build your perfect practice, your way. Combine Suryanamaskar, Pranayama, and custom activities into a saved routine. Includes a dedicated Yog Nidra sleep meditation module with a gentle sleep timer.
app7.feature4_desc: Your yoga journey, made visible. A heatmap calendar shows your consistency at a glance. Track daily and longest streaks, log all past sessions, and view stats on total movement and breathing time.
app7.step1_desc: Get Yoga Rhythm from the App Store or Google Play.
app7.step2_desc: Browse Suryanamaskar sequences, Pranayama techniques, or build a custom routine.
app7.step3_desc: Follow the guided timer, build your streak, and watch your yoga journey grow.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body1: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how
privacy.s1_body2: ("the App"), developed by TejasDevLabs, collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our App.
privacy.s2_body: We may collect the following types of information:
privacy.s2_li1: Information you provide: Name, email address, and other details you voluntarily submit.
privacy.s2_li2: Usage data: Information about how you use the App, including features accessed and time spent.
privacy.s2_li3: Device data: Device type, operating system version, and unique device identifiers.
privacy.s2_li4: Analytics data: Crash reports and performance data to improve the App.
privacy.s3_li1: To provide and maintain the App's functionality.
privacy.s3_li2: To improve, personalise, and expand our services.
privacy.s3_li3: To communicate with you, including for support and updates.
privacy.s4_body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted third-party service providers solely to operate and improve the App.
privacy.s5_body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion at any time by contacting us.
privacy.s6_body: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy.s6_li1: Access, correct, or delete your personal data.
privacy.s6_li2: Object to or restrict processing of your data.
privacy.s6_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at the address below.
privacy.s7_body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information. No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy.s8_body: The App is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us data, contact us immediately.
privacy.s9_body: The App may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
privacy.s10_body: We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
privacy.s11_body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: We're here to help. Find answers below or reach out directly.
support.faq1_q: How do I reset my password?
support.faq1_a: Go to the login screen, tap 'Forgot Password', and enter your email. You'll receive a reset link within a few minutes.
support.faq2_q: Is the app available on both iOS and Android?
support.faq2_a: Yes! The app is available on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
support.faq3_q: How do I cancel my subscription?
support.faq3_a: You can cancel your subscription at any time through your device's subscription settings (App Store or Google Play).
support.faq4_q: I found a bug. How do I report it?
support.faq4_a: Please use the contact form below to describe the issue. Include your device model and OS version for faster resolution.
support.contact_sub: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.
support.message_ph: Please describe your issue in detail...
support.success: Thanks! Your message has been sent. We'll be in touch soon.
